Name: Hotmart
Description:
Impactar desde o dia um. Foi com essa certeza que João Pedro Resende e Mateus Bicalho fundaram a Hotmart em 2011. Nascemos como uma startup mineira e nos tornamos uma empresa global de tecnologia com soluções inovadoras que transformam conteúdos em negócios digitais de sucesso. 

Somos pioneiros e líderes da Creator Economy (Economia dos Criadores de Conteúdo), possibilitando que milhões de pessoas vivam de suas paixões, transformando sua audiência em clientes, suas habilidades em produtos, e sua influência em negócios. 

Hoje somos +1.700 Troopers (é assim que chamamos nossos colaboradores e colaboradoras) espalhados pelo Brasil, Espanha, Colômbia, México, Estados Unidos, França e Países Baixos, onde fica localizada a nossa sede. Somos talentos diversos, movidos por encorajar as pessoas a compartilharem seus conhecimentos e ganharem o mundo. E fazemos isso com Liberdade, Autonomia e Love. Já são +200 mil criadores de conteúdo, com vendas registradas em +188 países. Impactar, pra nós, é permitir sonhar, mas também realizar. É ver milhões de vidas serem transformadas. É fazer parte de uma verdadeira revolução no mercado digital, que está só começando. 

Nós somos a Hotmart. Nosso trabalho impulsiona e fortalece negócios digitais, gerando empregos, disseminando conhecimento e impactando de verdade!

Name: One Impression
Description:
One Impression is a technology company on a mission to make the global creator economy as predictable, programmable, and performance-driven as any modern software stack. We believe the future of marketing is human, driven by millions of individual voices. We’re building the connective tissue that lets brands harness authentic human stories at scale while giving creators a clear path to sustainable, fairly rewarded careers. 

Famous is our flagship marketplace, home to a meticulously curated network of more than 100,000 creators across every major social platform. It’s a space where a skincare start-up can find ten science-backed micro-influencers just as easily as a global beverage giant can assemble a long-term ambassador program. Direct chat, transparent pricing, easy cancellations and data-rich performance dashboards are woven into every interaction—not as “features,” but as the default language of trust that turns one-off deals into long term creative partnerships.

Amplify is the fast lane built on top of that same foundation. It removes the heavy decision-making from influencer activation so ideas can travel at the speed of culture. A marketer can set a budget as low as ₹5,000, choose a goal, and in under a minute launch a campaign that automatically matches and activates hundreds of relevant creators—complete with time-bound delivery guarantees and cancel-anytime flexibility. 

For creators: Our unified mobile app opens the door to campaigns from both Famous and Amplify, turning scattered brand inquiries into a single, intuitive feed. Engage with campaigns that fit your voice, track earnings real time, and benchmark your growth against thousands of peers.

Our proprietary content-based fingerprinting identifies, classifies, and retrieves documents with 99%+ accuracy—regardless of filenames or folders:

Surface exact matches across disconnected systems instantly
Detect and eliminate true duplicates
Automatically cluster similar documents by verified type
Create a trusted repository without rebuilding from scratch
Search across SharePoint, OneDrive, Outlook, and custom integrations

No guesswork. No manual tagging. Just deterministic, transparent results.
Why It Matters
Document chaos carries real costs—missed files, failed audits, wasted hours, and compliance risks. Traditional solutions depend on perfect naming conventions and metadata, often failing despite months of work.
Sentry offers precision-first document assurance that integrates with your existing workflows, laying the foundation for true document intelligence.
Our Vision
We envision businesses operating from clean, trusted, and accessible information—where document management requires neither perfect organization nor constant intervention. Sentry brings clarity, not complexity.
Connect With Us
Book a discovery call to see if you qualify for our complimentary document assessment program. Qualified organizations receive a full file inventory, duplicate detection, and expert consultation—a $10,000+ value. Follow us or reach out to transform your document ecosystem.

Description:
Significance Systems is a science-based company that delivers to business leaders, capital markets, international development, marketing, HR and PR. 

The world now lives in media bubbles. These bubbles move people away from reality.

Decision making is often based on a poor orientation with what is actually happening in the world. We are constantly surprised by what happens — e.g. Trump, Brexit...

Facebook, Google, Linkedin, Twitter, Newspapers, TV, even focus groups, panels, consultants & experts still leave you in a bubble or subject to bias; most often by design.

We need to make better decisions, as individuals, organisations and societies. To do those things, we need better understand the reality around us. How do we do that?

Our platform -- Earth.ai -- identifies deep, underlying narratives and their key drivers, for any topic, in any language, over the whole internet. Earth.ai delivers a step change in performance over subject matter experts, social listening, behavioural research or ‘Big Data’ projects.

Our simple online products  deliver a view of reality that explains the current situation, correlates with what actually matters, and provide key diagnostics to help you effect change.

Key leading indicators:
- capital market movement
- market valuation
- sales
- brand preference and attribute performance 
- elections .... epidemics .... crisis .....

Name: Divee.AI
Description:
We make articles interactive. Drop one line of JavaScript into your site, and readers can ask questions, get summaries, and go deeper into your content, all without leaving the page.
Divee is an AI-powered widget built for publishers. It sits inside your articles and turns them into conversations. A reader doesn't know a term? They ask. They're curious about a detail buried in paragraph twelve? It's right there. No redirects.

One script tag. Works on WordPress, Webflow, React, custom HTML. No CMS migration, no dev sprint.
But we didn't build Divee just to keep people on the page longer (though it does 3x time-on-site on average). We built it because every question a reader asks is a signal. What confuses them. What excites them. What they want more of. 
Our dashboard turns those interactions into real audience intelligence: interests, sentiment, demographics, content gaps, and priority scoring across 30+ auto-generated tags.
Your articles already have the answers. Divee just lets your readers find them.

Name: Processized
Description:
When I started my career in startups, I thought chaos and disorganization were just part of the game. “We’re growing fast; chaos is normal,” we told ourselves.

But no matter where I worked, the same problems kept surfacing: scattered tools, missed deadlines, disorganized teams, and endless firefighting.

It was exhausting. I kept thinking, “There’s got to be a better way to run a business.”

That frustration put me on a years-long journey to study everything I could about systems, management, and productivity. I tested every tool, explored dozens of frameworks, and refined processes with every team I led.

After hundreds of iterations, I realized something critical: the problem wasn’t the tools—it was the lack of a holistic system.

A system that would:

 Centralize operations so everything—client work, deals, deliverables, and team progress—is in one place.
 Systemize workflows to track priorities, progress, and results, keeping teams organized and clients happy.
 Streamline and automate tasks to eliminate inefficiencies and free up time for growth.

This led me to build Processized, an operating system that eliminates chaos and helps founders scale their businesses with clarity and control.

But when I started helping founders, something clicked. The ones who got the biggest transformations weren’t just any founders. They were founders in the creator economy—running partnerships agencies, building audiences, and working with clients to close amazing deals.

These founders are brilliant at building relationships, closing deals, and creating value for their clients. But they’re held back by scattered operations, time-consuming admin, and endless to-do lists.

I realized this was my sweet spot—helping founders build businesses that run like machines so they can focus on what they do best.

Since then, I’ve helped over 30 founders—including those running creator partnerships agencies—reclaim hundreds of hours monthly and unlock stress-free growth.

Name: CreatorJobs
Description:
CreatorJobs ist eine 9:16 Creator-Agentur mit eigener Plattform und einem starkem Fokus auf datengetriebenem UGC.

 Der Creator-Markt & die Creator-Economy haben sich die letzten Jahre stark entwickelt & verändert. Von hochwertiger Fotografie hin zu authentischen Videos von Personen, die so sind wie du oder ich. Wir sprechen hier oft von UGC-Creatorn, oder in Langform: User-Generated-Content Creatorn. Menschen, die stark vor der Kamera sprechen können, kreative Ansätze bieten und fantastisch mit ihrem Equipment und Handy umgehen können. 

 Das Ergebnis dieser Entwicklung am Markt sind tausende von Creatorn, Plattformen & Agenturen, die ein ganz schön großes Chaos verursachen.  Viele unserer Kunden oder auch potentiellen neuen Kunden sind verunsichert, wie sie sich richtig aufstellen sollen und was gerade jetzt die richtige Option für sie ist.

Und hier entsteht ein großes Problem: Jeder will irgendwie UGC-Videos für Brands produzieren. Im besten Fall: Hook, Inhalt, Call-To-Action - Fertig. Egal, ob wir von organischem Content oder Paid-Media sprechen. 

 So funktioniert das nur leider nicht mehr. Besonders nicht, wenn jeder genau diese Art von Videos produziert. Menschen auf Instagram, TikTok oder YouTube verstehen mittlerweile, das genau diese Art von Videos Werbung sind.

Und genau hier setzen wir aktuell an: 

 Was ist der Pain eurer Kunden? Was löst ein Glücksgefühl bei ihnen aus? Wie schafft ihr es, durch Content Emotionen zu erwecken? Mit diesen marketing-psychologischen Aspekten stellen wir uns die zentrale Frage, welchen Content sich eure Zielgruppe auf Social Media ansieht und mit welchem Content sie interagiert.

Durch eine datengetriebene Ausspielung von 10, 20 oder sogar 30 Videos steigern wir uns von Monat zu Monat in der Performance und machen Unternehmen langfristig zu einer Love-Brand auf Social Media.

Description:
In China, speed is everything. Consumer preferences shift overnight and legacy marketing plans fail. For global brands, this market is both the biggest opportunity and the greatest challenge. It often feels like a "black box." 

Chaoly was born from the frontline of this challenge. As former Tmall Partners, we launched and ran our own stores in China, experiencing firsthand the frustration of unclear reports and missed opportunities. We knew there had to be a better way.

Our Difference: A Growth Hacking Mindset
We don't believe in rigid, long-term plans. We embrace continuous experimentation. Powered by data and AI, our core approach is to test small, learn fast, and scale what works. While traditional agencies focus on "best practices," we focus on running the experiments needed to find what truly drives growth for you, today.

What We Do:
We provide the objective data and strategic oversight you need to lead with confidence. Our work is focused on two key areas:

* eCommerce ROI Optimization: We deliver a "China eCommerce Performance Benchmark" to give you a crystal-clear picture of your performance, and a "90-Day China Growth Roadmap" to improve it.

* Innovation Validation: We de-risk new product launches with our "China Innovation Scorecard" and 4-week "Customer Discovery Sprint," helping you build what Chinese consumers truly want.

We are the trusted strategic partner for ambitious brands like Nestlé, Philips, and Rémy Cointreau.

Ready to trade uncertainty for a confident action plan? Follow us for data-driven insights on winning in China.

Name: The Fuzzy Logic Podcast
Description:
From how to tip to when to have children, decisions big and small come with the question: “how could this benefit me?” In Fuzzy Logic, hosts Matt Haller and Chris Michaud tackle the ins-and-outs of incentive-based decision making, showcasing how we often make decisions based upon imprecise and imperfect information - and at what cost. 

Join them as they explore questions like “why do we insist on tipping? Who really stands to benefit from affordable housing incentives?” and more, Matt and Chris will combine history with expert conversation to show you who exactly benefits from the status quo - and what's at stake for the future.

Fuzzy Logic drops every Wednesday and can be found wherever you get your podcasts.

Description:

Does the market immediately recognize a distinctive value in your brand?
Do clients and partners clearly understand what sets your brand apart?
Is your brand effectively reaching and resonating with the right audience?

Our work is structured across the following domains: 

 BRAND INTELLIGENCE
We define market opportunities, competitive advantage, value propositions, and brand architecture to identify meaningful differentiation. Through qualitative and competitive research, we surface the core idea that supports a clear, credible, and defensible brand positioning. 

 BRAND ACTIVATION 
We translate brand strategy into lived experience, ensuring that positioning is consistently expressed through behaviors, interactions, and environments. Activation functions as a strategic lever for relevance and engagement, not as a promotional layer. 

 BRAND IMAGE
We design and refine core communication assets, like visual identity systems, brand narratives, and visual languages, to ensure coherence, clarity, and recognition across touchpoints. We design and develop digital experiences, spanning websites, applications, and interactive systems, that support coherent user journeys, aligning reputation management with brand strategy to ensure consistency between intended positioning and encountered experience.

HERA is founded by Rosie Allimonos, Nishma Patel Robb and Kirsty Hunter, distinguished media professionals with decades of experience in delivering premium content and fuelling brand growth.

Their wealth of expertise powers HERA to amplify women’s stories at scale and democratise creation through its infrastructure, original content, unique community, bespoke and proprietary technology and a new commercial model for the next wave of female-led entertainment. 

With 80% of the top 10 podcasts on the UK Spotify Charts being hosted solely by men, and only 20% having a female host or co-host, there is a huge cultural and commercial gap in the market.
Women are expected to control 75% of discretionary spending by 2030, but female audiences remain underserved and brands are missing out!

In addition, HERA Club is a membership for women and non-binary people making or hosting or planning their own podcasts. Swipp refers to the aggregated data as the "Swipp Index" as it aggregates multiple social data points in near real-time, and gives a global view of the data source (location, gender, age), trending information, over-time reporting, and other data points when available. Swipp takes a crowd-informed view on a topic and displays it in conjunction with topic based reference data from Freebase. The resulting assemblage Swipp refers to as "Social Intelligence" – "Social" because it extracts data from Swipp-based social expression touch-points embedded across the internet and connected applications, and "Intelligent” because it merges that social expression data with factual data.

Description:
Fluenceur est une plateforme française d'affiliation sociale. Elle permet aux marques e-commerce de transformer leurs clients et créateurs en affiliés - rémunérés uniquement à la vente.

Le modèle est simple : vous ne payez pas pour des posts. Vous rémunérez des ventes réelles, générées par des créateurs qui parlent de votre marque et des clients qui la recommandent.

Au cœur de la plateforme, un compagnon IA qui travaille à partir de l'ADN de votre marque. Il analyse votre positionnement, votre voix et votre audience pour construire un profil BrandDNA unique. 

À partir de là, il recherche parmi 10M+ profils créateurs en langage naturel, évalue la compatibilité de chaque créateur avec votre marque, interprète vos KPIs, génère des graphiques de performance et répond à vos questions sur n'importe quel affilié en quelques secondes. C'est un vrai assistant qui s'adapte à votre marque - pas un moteur de recherche avec des filtres.

La plateforme automatise ensuite l'ensemble du cycle :

- Social listening : chaque mention détectée automatiquement avec les données d'engagement
- Workflows visuels (Flows) pour automatiser onboarding, cadeaux, commissions et paliers de récompense
- Tracking et attribution des ventes par lien unique
Paiements et facturation automatisés
- Co-publicité : boostez le contenu créateur en Partnership Ads directement depuis la plateforme

Réservez une démo sur www.fluenceur.com

YouSeeMii.fr permet aux Marques, aux Entreprises, aux Personnes de mesurer et de suivre l’évolution de leur identité digitale pour mieux gérer leur e-Reputation.
Les contenus en ligne liés à votre recherche sont identifiés en temps réel.

Comprendre et gérer sa présence
Marques, Entreprises et Personnes, Youseemii permet de mesurer et de suivre l’évolution de son identité digitale pour mieux gérer son e-Réputation.

L'indice de visibilité
Moteurs de recherche, réseaux sociaux, blogs, forums, presse, sites d’emploi, images, vidéos, documents, applications iPhone, Youseemii explore en temps réel les informations librement accessibles. Youseemii établit un indice de visibilité sur une échelle de 1 à 100.

YouSeeMii (english version)

YouSeeMii is a data aggregator which gathers freely available information on the Internet.
 
YouSeeMii permits brand holders, companies and individuals to evaluate and to monitor the evolution of their digital identity, in order to best manage their e-Reputation.
 
YouSeeMii enables real-time access to the overall information published in search engines but also in social networks, blogs, forums, press, employment sites, images, videos, documents and Iphone applications. 
Out of the gathered information, YouSeeMii calculates a global visibility score and by category scores.
The fruit of several years of R&D, YouSeeMii has developed its own algorithms.

Name: Click Alert
Description:
Our team has been operating in the digital world since the early 2000s, working with leading Brazilian providers and portals in e-commerce initiatives, search campaign management, game development and distribution, digital content, payment methods, and other areas. This wealth of experience allows us to understand the main challenges faced by advertisers, which has motivated us to create tailored services to combat fraud in search and programmatic media campaigns.

In general, our clients face significant challenges in their day-to-day operations as they manage a complex set of online marketing initiatives that involve social networks, search engines, programmatic media, promotions, brand positioning, e-commerce, and many other fronts. While there are tools available that promise to combat fraud in online media campaigns, we understand that our clients have other priorities.

Selecting the best tools, managing them, and taking the necessary actions to combat fraud can divert focus from their core business. Therefore, Click Alert was created to be the single point of contact for combating fraud in online media campaigns.

Currently, there are skilled and creative fraudsters who use systems and robots to develop elaborate fraud schemes. That's why our clients have an experienced team and an ecosystem comprised of the best tools on the planet at their service. Click Alert relies on specialized robots for fraud detection, feeding advanced systems that incorporate technologies such as machine learning and artificial intelligence in the fight against fraud.

Our approach is to stay ahead of fraudsters by constantly evolving our strategies and technologies. We analyze large volumes of data through machine learning algorithms and AI-powered systems to detect patterns and anomalies that indicate fraudulent activities.

Name: Impression Studio
Description:
A Digital Marketing Agency is a company that specializes in helping businesses enhance their online presence, reach their target audiences, and achieve measurable growth through various digital channels. These agencies offer a range of services tailored to meet specific marketing goals, utilizing the latest strategies and tools in the digital landscape. Here’s a breakdown of what a typical digital marketing agency provides: Search Engine Optimization (SEO):
SEO is the process of optimizing a website to rank higher on search engines like Google. A digital marketing agency works to increase organic (unpaid) traffic to your website by improving its visibility on search engine results pages (SERPs). They focus on:

Keyword research and targeting
On-page and off-page optimization
Technical SEO (site speed, mobile responsiveness)
Local SEO for businesses targeting specific regions
2. Pay-Per-Click (PPC) Advertising:
PPC campaigns are a form of paid advertising where businesses only pay when users click on their ads. These ads are typically displayed on search engines and social media platforms. The agency manages:

Google Ads and Bing Ads campaigns
Social media advertising (Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, etc.)
Display and banner advertising
Retargeting campaigns to reach past visitors
3. Social Media Marketing:
Social media platforms like Facebook, Instagram, Twitter, and LinkedIn are essential for building a strong brand presence and engaging with your audience. A digital marketing agency can:

Create and manage content calendars
Design posts and ads tailored to each platform
Run paid social media campaigns
Monitor social media analytics and adjust strategies for optimal engagement
4. Content Marketing:
Content marketing involves creating valuable, relevant, and consistent content to attract and retain a clearly defined audience. Agencies help businesses by:

Developing blogs, articles, infographics, and videos
Creating content that aligns with SEO and brand strategy
Man

Name: Used and Loved
Description:
Used and Loved is a second-hand search engine powering the creator economy, starting with curated second-hand fashion. 

Used and Loved is the first place in the world where second-hand style content creators can monetise from doing what they love: sharing their expertise to encourage more to move away from buying new. 

We know how important it is to reduce the overconsumption of new, but right now, nothing fills the void of the experiences between buying new and buying used. When you buy new, you have shoppable online content from influencers on nearly every platform, but nothing is enabled for buying used in the same way. 

We are working with influencers and content creators who already share their outfit inspiration pics on social media and have highly engaged followings. And our tool makes their content shoppable. 

We have built a second-hand aggregator/search engine, so when a creator uploads one of their looks to Used and Loved, they tag the search terms for each of the items, so our tool shows shoppers all the similar second-hand items available to buy so that the shopper can re-create those looks. 

Creators can also curate 'Live Lists' of all the very best hidden gems that only they find on Used and Loved. They trawl the second-hand web, so our subscribers don't have to! Subscribers will also get early access to the most popular looks on Shop the Look and access to our community chat.

The agentic brand intelligence firm. Mapping customer influence.

Stories are the new code. And Merlin writes the code that programmes the most powerful brand distribution system in human history. 

Merlin maps the buyer journey to understand where customers get their information and what influences them to build brand engagement using agentic AI.  

Merlin is unlike any other intelligence firm or agency. Merlin leverages brand and customer insights to build campaigns that influence. 

Merlin understands that LLMs no longer trust ads and they don't trust backlinks. They trust consensus. They weight information based on how many credible, independent sources say the same thing in consistent language. Earned media in authoritative publications is the highest-trust signal an LLM can encounter.

What does this mean? A well-placed article in the Financial Times does not just reach human readers any more. It trains the models. A structured whitepaper on your domain does not sit in a PDF. It becomes foundational context that AI draws on every time someone queries your market.

Our approach
Diagnose: We apply our proprietary framework to assess brand resonance by monitoring how LLMs such as GPT-4, Claude, Gemini, and Perplexity perceive your brand in real time. We identify miscategorisations, hallucinations, and negative bias across every major model, showing you exactly how AI describes your company to potential customers, employees and investors.

Engineer: We create structured brand narratives designed for machine comprehension. Earned media in authoritative publications. Owned content on high-authority domains. Technical documentation that LLMs treat as ground truth. All engineered so AI systems amplify your brand story faithfully.

Amplify: We orchestrate your narrative across the sources AI models trust most. When a buyer's AI agent queries a language model for vendor recommendations, your brand surfaces naturally, through earned authority, not paid placement.

Hi,
I am sujit,Certainly! Digital marketing is a broad and dynamic field that encompasses various strategies and techniques to promote products or services using dig Here are some key aspects and topics related to digital marketing:

Search Engine Optimization (SEO): SEO involves optimizing your website to rank higher in search engine results pages (SERPs). It includes on-page and off-page optimization, keyword research, content creation, and technical optimizations to improve organic traffic.

Content Marketing: Content is a cornerstone of digital marketing. It includes creating and distributing valuable, relevant, and consistent content to attract and engage a target audience. Content can be in the form of blog posts, videos, infographics, ebooks, and more.

Social Media Marketing: This involves using social media platforms like Facebook, Instagram, Twitter, and LinkedIn to connect with your audience, build brand awareness, and drive traffic to your website. Paid advertising on these platforms is also a significant aspect.

Email Marketing: Email marketing involves sending targeted emails to a list of subscribers to promote products, share updates, and build relationships. Personalization and automation play a crucial role in this strategy.

Pay-Per-Click Advertising (PPC): PPC advertising, such as Google Ads and Bing Ads, allows businesses to display ads to users who search for specific keywords. Advertisers pay a fee each time their ad is clicked.

Affiliate Marketing: In this model, businesses reward affiliates (partners) for driving traffic or sales to their website through the affiliate's marketing efforts. It's a performance-based marketing strategy.

Influencer Marketing: Brands collaborate with influencers in their niche to promote their products or services. Influencers have a dedicated and engaged following, making them valuable for reaching a specific audience.

Analytics and Data Analysis: Digital marketers rely on tools like Google Analytics to track

Description:
Suruna develops a personalized video programming system that allows publishers and content owners to generate more video views and engage users. 

The current Machine Learning neural networks are trained to match video data with behavioral data, the result is an infinite and exhausting feed. Our approach differs significantly from the currently implemented solutions. We are focused in create strong connections between people and content to unleash new and more productive human-machine relations. 

Suruna’s solution uses AI and Machine Learning to understand video content. Also uses its own-designed set of algorithms based on BDI AI models to create video clusters and give video recommendations. Suruna brings the data-driven approach to video programming, letting the publishers could better engage audiences and grow viewership. 

We are offering a set of three APIs. Prediction API Suruna analyses your videos inventory, your users behaviors and starts creating the right set of videos to the right user. You can start to scale your human curation process with Suruna Prediction API. Insider API Suruna Insider API extracts knowledge from your videos, creating taxonomies automatically, structuring you data. 

You can start navigating your videos by words, images, concepts. Bringing new life your old assets, empowering your current content. Intelligence API When is the right moment to broadcast a video? Which video is better than other for a marketing campaign? How was the emotional reaction? Suruna Intelligence API provides recommendations on how to get exponential shares and audiences.

Your Brand On Time (yBoT) is the Multimodal AI platform that restores vision to brands and agencies. Our proprietary engine processes, transcribes, and analyzes video content in real-time, detecting organic brand mentions that are currently invisible to the market.

Why yBoT?

Multimodal Intelligence: We don't just read text; we listen to audio and process embedded subtitles at scale.

Enterprise Scale: Over 27 million records indexed on a robust, high-performance infrastructure powered by Azure & Kubernetes.

Operational Efficiency: Automate manual video monitoring and achieve up to a 90% reduction in operational costs.

Secure Access: Native Azure integration for seamless corporate onboarding and IT compliance (ideal for WPP and global advertising holdings).

The era of guesswork is over. Welcome to the era of Total Listening.

Stop scrolling. Start listening.

Name: IUS.earth
Description:
IUS.earth offers a comprehensive and advanced solution for SMEs, blending sustainability, environmental management, and strategic intelligence.

 The platform features functionalities to calculate and periodically monitor carbon footprint, manage carbon credits, and provide detailed reports.

 Beyond these features, the tool focuses on data integration and processing using AI and machine learning to create a dynamic digital twin of the Earth.

 This encompasses ecological, economic, and social data, enabling strategic intelligence services for businesses in areas like nearshoring location, investment, procurement, risk identification and mitigation, strategic partnerships, industrial synergies, sustainability strategies, circular economies, and emission calculation, monitoring, and management.

 A unique feature is the creation of a "Tinder-style" business network in the sustainability realm, promoting new business opportunities and allowing the tracing of an SME's entire value chain.

 Additionally, the platform offers impact prediction and prevention capabilities, positioning itself as an essential tool for decision-making in the modern sustainability-focused business environment.

Name: StreamQuest
Description:
StreamQuest is a gamified, performance driven influencer platform built video games and publishers.
We turn traditional marketing on its head by empowering micro-streamers to become your most powerful marketing tool  one Quest at a time.

In today’s industry, visibility is expensive and often superficial.
Streamers are paid for exposure, not outcomes. Studios spend thousands chasing reach  only to convert a fraction of it.

We believe in a different path: depth over vanity, authenticity over algorithms, and community over clout.

 How It Works:

At StreamQuest, every campaign is a Quest:
- Main Quests give creators paid objectives (like streaming your game to a target audience)
- Side Quests reward EXP for optional actions, like social shares, wishlist pushes, reviews, or surveys
- Every action is tracked, verified, and delivered back to you in a detailed report

You only pay for completed activations. Unused funds? Returned to you.
It’s fair, clear, and performance-based by design.

What Makes StreamQuest Different?

We focus on micro-influencers, the passionate Twitch affiliates and early-career creators who actually engage with their audiences

We offer full campaign setup, creator validation, key distribution, and reporting

Campaigns scale affordably, without sacrificing quality or attention

Our model includes organic QA insights, real gameplay data, chat reactions, and community sentiment

We support early access, vertical slice testing, launches, and UGC collection, all through one campaign

Our Mission:

To help great games get discovered by the authentic audiences  not just the loudest ones.
We believe trust converts better than traffic, and small streams create big waves when aligned with the right goals.

Enter the new age of marketing with us. 

Contact@streamquest.io

Name: Eklipsa
Description:
Eklipsa is a Brand Intelligence System built for brand strategists and boutique agencies.

Most brand workshops uncover valuable strategic thinking — purpose, positioning, audience insight, voice, and direction. But once the session ends, that thinking often gets trapped in decks, docs, and notes. Every new campaign, message, or deliverable then requires someone to reinterpret the strategy again.

Eklipsa solves that continuity gap.

The platform helps strategists run structured brand workshops, capture the thinking behind those workshops as usable Brand Intelligence, and turn the outcome into a living brand system that keeps guiding real work.

Instead of strategy living in static artifacts, it becomes an active foundation that supports messaging, content, campaigns, and brand guidance.

HOW EKLIPSA WORKS

→ Structured workshops
Guide brand discovery, positioning, audience, voice, and direction inside a clear facilitation framework.

→ Brand Intelligence
Workshop answers become a connected strategic foundation the system can understand and retain.

→ Real work
Use that foundation across messaging, content, campaigns, and brand outputs without re-explaining the brand every time.

WHO EKLIPSA IS BUILT FOR

→ Solo brand strategists

→ Boutique brand agencies

→ Fractional brand leads

These are teams that already run brand workshops and want a stronger structure and better continuity between strategy and execution. The goal is not to replace strategic thinking — it is to make that thinking more structured, more reusable, and more durable after the workshop ends.

THE CORE IDEA

Structured workshops in → living brand system out.

Eklipsa helps strategists preserve their thinking, reduce re-interpretation, and deliver brand strategy that stays active long after the workshop ends.

Name: Sentaiment
Description:

Our technology addresses a critical blind spot in today's brand monitoring landscape: while most companies actively track their social media presence, they lack visibility into how AI systems are independently defining and representing their brand.

Founded by a team with deep expertise in AI and enterprise software, including former leadership from Fortune 15 companies, Sentaiment was developed in response to the growing influence of AI systems on brand perception and consumer decision-making.

Our platform is built around our BEACON methodology framework, providing structured analysis across multiple dimensions of brand representation. We help brands understand the gap between their intended identity and how they're actually portrayed in AI systems through quantifiable metrics and actionable insights.

Sentaiment operates with a lean, high-expertise team model, focusing on technical excellence and automated solutions that maintain high margins while delivering enterprise-grade capabilities. We serve clients across industries including retail, technology, financial services, CPG, and regulated sectors where brand accuracy is critical.

Name: Remote Digital Marketing Solution
Description:
Remote digital marketing solution refers to a set of digital marketing strategies, tactics, and tools that are executed remotely, without the need for physical presence or face-to-face interaction. This approach is particularly relevant in today's global business environment where remote work is becoming more prevalent and necessary.

Remote digital marketing solutions enable businesses to reach and engage with their target audiences through various digital channels, including email, social media, search engines, and mobile apps. These solutions can be used to promote products or services, build brand awareness, drive website traffic, generate leads, and increase sales.

Examples of remote digital marketing solutions include:

#Search engine optimization (SEO): optimizing your website and content to rank higher in search engine results pages (SERPs) for relevant keywords.

#Social media marketing: using social media platforms such as Facebook, Twitter, and LinkedIn to promote your brand and engage with your audience.

#Email marketing: sending targeted and personalized emails to your subscribers to promote your products or services, build relationships, and drive conversions.

#Content marketing: creating and distributing valuable and relevant content such as blog posts, videos, and infographics to attract and engage your audience.

#Paid advertising: using platforms such as Google Ads and Facebook Ads to display targeted ads to your audience.

#Analytics and reporting: using tools such as Google Analytics to track and analyze your digital marketing campaigns' performance and optimize them for better results.

Remote digital marketing solutions provide businesses with the ability to reach their target audience regardless of physical location, and offer flexibility, scalability, and cost-effectiveness compared to traditional marketing methods.

Name: Pluribus Labs
Description:
Pluribus Labs builds narrative intelligence software for the people and organizations trying to understand — and shape — how stories spread.
Narratives drive elections, policy debates, and public trust. But the tools most organizations rely on were built for a pre-social-media world. Polls tell you what people thought last week. Social listening tells you what's trending. Neither tells you what narratives are forming right now, who's driving them, or whether your response is actually working.

Pluribus closes that gap with four products that operate as a continuous loop:

Polygraph — Real-time narrative detection. Extracts claims and sub-narratives from any content, revealing what's spreading and why. Used for live fact-checking during the 2026 State of the Union.

Atlas — Narrative research. Maps who's saying what, where it's spreading, and why it's resonating.

Rally — People-powered amplification. Mobilizes real people around shared narratives — no bots, no astroturfing.

Compass — Narrative measurement. Connects social activity to real-world outcomes so you know what's actually moving the needle.

The insight behind the whole system: narratives compound. Detection sharpens distribution, distribution enables mobilization, mobilization generates measurement, and measurement feeds back into better detection. Most tools treat these as separate problems. Pluribus treats them as one system.

Interpretation & Assertion Governance
Engineering entity and knowledge graph architecture, model-readable content structures, and authority signals that allow AI systems to correctly understand and trust organizational information.

Demand Capture Systems
Designing retrieval architectures that govern how organizations appear across search engines, AI assistants, and discovery platforms.

Demand Creation Systems
Building scalable demand engines through content intelligence, social distribution, video discovery, influencer ecosystems, and reputation infrastructure.

Conversion & Revenue Governance
Engineering lifecycle systems including CRO experimentation frameworks, email revenue systems, affiliate networks, and partner growth infrastructure.

Analytics & Measurement Systems
Building decision intelligence infrastructure through marketing analytics, attribution modeling, forecasting systems, and operational data governance.

Our work replaces fragmented marketing activities with coherent operating systems for demand generation, demand capture, and revenue realization.

PhiloSEOphy serves organizations that understand modern discovery systems operate on meaning, entities, authority signals, and governed information architecture—not just keywords and campaigns.

We begin with campaign strategy and planning, where we understand the brand’s goals, target audience, and key messaging. Based on this, we design influencer campaigns that feel natural and engaging rather than overly promotional. Every campaign is structured to deliver clarity, consistency, and impact.

Our influencer discovery and vetting process ensures that brands collaborate with creators who truly resonate with their audience. We manage the entire creator outreach and coordination process, including communication, negotiation, and collaboration guidelines. This helps brands save time while ensuring smooth execution and professional handling of influencer relationships.

Content execution is handled with close attention to brand alignment and authenticity. We ensure influencers deliver content that fits the brand voice while maintaining their creative freedom, resulting in more genuine and effective storytelling.

Post-campaign, we provide performance tracking and insights to evaluate reach, engagement, and overall effectiveness. This data helps brands understand what worked and optimize future campaigns for better results.

Our services are ideal for startups, growing brands, and digital-first companies looking to scale through influencer-led marketing. At Evolbix, our focus is simple building trust through authentic influence, not just running ads.

Name: CreatorAccess Media
Description:
At CreatorAccess Media, we believe marketing works best when it doesn’t feel like marketing.

Let’s be honest — most people scroll past ads faster than they scroll past their morning alarm. Pop-ups get closed, banners get ignored, and sponsored posts often disappear into the endless social media feed.

But when a creator you follow talks about something they genuinely like, it doesn’t feel like an advertisement. It feels like a recommendation. And recommendations are powerful.

That’s where CreatorAccess Media comes in.

We help brands connect with creators who already have the attention and trust of their audiences. Instead of brands shouting into the internet hoping someone listens, we help them collaborate with creators who are already having meaningful conversations with their communities.

Think of us as the friendly middleman of the creator economy.

On one side, there are brands looking for authentic ways to reach people. On the other side, there are creators producing great content but often searching for the right brand collaborations. We simply help the right people find each other.

Creator AccessMedia focuses on micro and mid-tier creators across platforms like Instagram and YouTube, helping brands run campaigns that feel natural and engaging rather than forced.

Creators can join our network completely free, and when a campaign fits their niche and audience, we connect them with brands looking for partnerships.

Our goal is simple:

• Help brands reach real audiences
• Help creators access meaningful opportunities
• Make influencer marketing easier for everyone

Because when the right creator talks about a brand, people don’t skip it — they listen.

CreatorAccess Media — Access to the Voice of Creators.

Name: Theglowhouse.org
Description:
Not Just a Company. A Movement.
GlowHouse is the creator-owned activation engine of the new economy. Together with TimeOps (labor rails) and Glowchain (sponsorship rails), GlowHouse completes the third pillar — culture. The three pillars operate in lockstep to form a modern Marshall Plan for the 99%, redirecting wasted capital into perpetual yield and redistributing ownership back to workers, creators, and communities.
For decades, capital has flowed inefficiently through broken systems:
Sponsorship dollars are spent as fleeting expenses with no compounding return.


Creators, who generate cultural value and global audiences, are paid in promo codes and small contracts while equity flows to others.


Events — festivals, tournaments, conferences, retreats — flare brightly for a week, then vanish, leaving no continuity or wealth creation.


GlowHouse changes this dynamic by transforming every dollar of sponsorship, every moment of culture, and every hour of labor into programmable capital. Instead of waste, GlowHouse creates yield. Instead of promo codes, it creates ownership. Instead of fleeting events, it creates continuity that fuels new brands and new economies.
At its core, GlowHouse is about inevitability. The creator economy has already proven that individuals have the power to command global audiences, shift markets, and move billions in consumer spend. What has not yet been built is the infrastructure to give those creators and their communities equity in the value they generate. GlowHouse is that infrastructure — the ignition engine that makes the TimeOps and Glowchain rails unstoppable.
This is more than a media company. It is a movement company:
Sponsorship → Perpetual Yield


Culture → Ownership


Labor → Wealth

Gollier – Informer. Inspirer. Scaler.

Grâce à un contenu à forte valeur ajoutée, basé sur des preuves, des chiffres et des expériences terrain, nous connectons les bonnes personnes, au bon moment, avec les bons deals.

Chez Gollier, nous croyons qu’un média ne doit pas seulement informer : il doit inspirer l’action et provoquer la croissance. C’est pourquoi nos formats vont bien au-delà des simples publications :

Analyses de deals réels : comprendre les marges, les stratégies et les coulisses.

Démonstrations et challenges : mettre en lumière les compétences et les méthodes qui marchent.
Études de cas : tirer des leçons applicables de transactions réussies.
Notre audience est composée de vendeurs cherchant de la visibilité ciblée, d’acheteurs en quête de deals filtrés, et de professionnels souhaitant s’inspirer pour scaler leur propre activité. Chaque contenu est pensé pour générer un dealflow qualifié et renforcer la crédibilité de notre écosystème.
Nous ne nous contentons pas de raconter l’histoire : nous participons à l’écriture des succès. Gollier est là pour connecter, propulser et faire grandir ceux qui osent voir plus grand.

Informer. Inspirer. Scaler.
Avec Gollier, votre business ne se contente pas de suivre le marché... il le précède.

Name: Brandvector.io
Description:
brandvector is an AI brand monitoring platform that tracks how your company appears in AI search engines like ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Claude.
The problem: Millions of people now ask AI assistants for product recommendations, software comparisons, and buying advice. If your brand isn't showing up in those answers—or worse, your competitors are—you're losing revenue to a channel you can't see.
What we do: brandvector gives you visibility into the invisible. Our platform monitors AI-generated responses for your brand, tracks your Share of Voice against competitors, and shows you exactly how AI models describe your product.
With brandvector, you can:
→ Track brand mentions across ChatGPT, Perplexity, Grok, and Claude
→ Monitor competitor visibility in AI search results
→ Measure your Share of Voice in AI-generated recommendations
→ Generate optimized prompts to test how AI perceives your brand
→ Get alerts when your AI visibility changes
Who it's for: brandvector is built for B2B SaaS companies, marketing teams, and agencies who understand that AI search is the next battleground for organic discovery. If you're investing in SEO, you should be investing in GEO (Generative Engine Optimization).
Why now: AI search isn't coming—it's here. ChatGPT has over 200 million weekly users. Perplexity processes millions of queries daily. The brands that monitor and optimize for this channel now will own it for years to come.
Traditional search tools can't help you here. Google Analytics doesn't track ChatGPT. Your SEO platform doesn't monitor Perplexity. brandvector does.
Start tracking your AI visibility at brandvector.io

Compromiso con la Calidad: Nos enfocamos en brindar un servicio de alta calidad, con un enfoque constante en la mejora continua y la satisfacción del cliente.

Name: Ciiimple
Description:
Ciiimple is an AI-powered platform that transforms how companies present themselves to investors.

Instead of static CIMs and fragmented data rooms, Ciiimple turns company information into a structured, intelligent, and interactive experience—making it easy for investors to quickly understand a business, its financials, and its growth potential.

Companies use Ciiimple to upload documents, automatically extract key insights, and organize everything into a unified, investor-ready intelligence layer. Financials, metrics, and supporting materials are no longer buried in files—they are surfaced as clear, structured insights that investors can explore in real time.

At the core of Ciiimple is a shift from documents to understanding.

Investors can interact with a company’s data, analyze performance, and get instant answers—without digging through folders or piecing together information manually. Every insight is backed by source documents, ensuring transparency and trust throughout the diligence process.

The platform combines secure data infrastructure, AI-powered document intelligence, and investor engagement analytics to help founders, operators, and deal teams move faster from initial interest to informed investment decisions.

Ciiimple also integrates with Sliiides, enabling teams to create and manage pitch materials alongside their structured company intelligence—ensuring consistency across storytelling, data, and investor communication.

Built for modern fundraising and M&A, Ciiimple replaces static documents with a dynamic, investor-first experience.

Turn your company into investor-ready intelligence.

Name: GeoVera
Description:
GeoVera lahir dari satu kenyataan yang simpel:  
di era AI, banyak brand dan creator bukan kekurangan konten, tapi kebanyakan konten yang nggak jelas arahnya.

Kamu mungkin pernah ada di posisi ini:  
akun social media banyak, laporan SEO dan analytics numpuk, sudah coba berbagai AI tools, tapi tiap hari masih bingung,  
“Sebenernya, hari ini kita harus bikin konten apa biar mulai kelihatan dan hasilnya berasa?”

GeoVera ada untuk nemenin kamu di titik itu.

Kami membangun **platform brand & content intelligence** yang fokusnya menjahit semua jejak digital kamu — website, blog, social media, data iklan, sampai sinyal dari mesin pencari dan AI — lalu menerjemahkannya jadi insight dan **task harian yang konkret**.  
Bukan dashboard rumit, tapi hal-hal praktis seperti:

- topik apa yang lagi masuk akal untuk kamu bahas sekarang,  
- di platform mana sebaiknya kamu muncul,  
- konten mana yang layak di‐scale, di‐ulang, atau di‐pivot,  
- dan apa yang perlu kamu perbaiki supaya lebih mudah ditemukan di SEO, GEO, dan social search.

Tujuannya sederhana:  
bikin perjalanan kamu dari “posting terus tapi nggak yakin” pelan‐pelan berubah jadi “aku tahu persis kenapa hari ini kita bikin konten ini, di channel ini, dengan angle seperti ini.”

Kalau kamu brand, founder, atau creator yang pengin mulai serius kelihatan di mesin pencari, AI search, dan social media search tanpa tambah pusing sama tools.

GeoVera dirancang untuk jadi satu lapisan otak tambahan yang bantu kamu mikir; supaya konten nggak cuma banyak, tapi juga punya arah.

Name: HypePipe
Description:
The influencer marketing industry is projected at $24 billion globally, yet the operational infrastructure behind it remains manual, fragmented, and exposed to regulatory risk. Agency staff still watch every piece of sponsored content by hand, checking it against contractual agreements through slow, error-prone processes that do not scale.

HypePipe is building the compliance infrastructure layer for the creator economy. Our platform manages the full influencer campaign lifecycle, from discovery and contract standardisation through to automated content monitoring, FTC disclosure verification, and post-campaign enforcement.

At the core is a multimodal AI engine that turns contracts into machine-readable rules and verifies deliverables against them in real time. Every campaign processed trains the underlying detection model, creating a compounding accuracy advantage that grows with usage.

For agencies and brands, this means fewer manual hours spent on compliance review, faster campaign turnaround, reduced regulatory exposure, and consistent brand protection across every creator engagement.

HypePipe Pty Ltd (ACN 695 080 570) is registered in Australia and headquartered in New South Wales.

Learn more at hypepipe.ai

THE PROBLEM WE SEE
Modern productivity tools have failed us. We have 47 apps to "stay organized" but feel more overwhelmed than ever. Nothing connects work, health, relationships, and personal growth into one coherent picture.

WHY THIS MATTERS
The world needs Life Designers, not just productive people. We believe everyone deserves technology that respects human agency and supports intentional living, tools that integrate rather than fragment, that serve human flourishing rather than just efficiency.

Over the next 3 months, we're sharing our research and vision for Life Design Technology through thought leadership, white papers, and community conversations. We're exploring what it means to move beyond productivity paradigms and create tools that truly serve how humans want to live.

Empower a world of Life Designers. Make intentional, integrated living accessible to millions.

Name: RoboCorp.co
Description:
RoboCorp is an entirely new kind of “distributed wisdom search and exchange engine” built on three building blocks:
1.	Wisdom Search, which returns actionable solutions instead of links
2.	Value Stack, which turns data, agents, widgets, utilities, media, and models into tradable assets
3.	DAAC, a fixed-supply cryptocurrency that serves as an instant payment method between knowledge seekers and creators.

The vision is clear: to dismantle the “giants win, creators get zero” model and create a new economy where human intelligence is rewarded in real time. 
The company addresses a tangible pain point: the lack of fair pay for professional content creators and a distrust of generic information (‘Hallucination’) produced by LLM Models.

The “directly paid verified expert” value proposition echoes a growing trend of marketplaces for vertical AI agents. The Value Stack integration creates a flexible onboarding path: an analyst can sell data, a professional can package an agent, and a lecturer can list a course as a rewarding medium.

Using crypto as a rail for global micropayments meets the limitations of credit cards and PayPal and creates the potential for ongoing value capture for each party in the chain, while ultimately building an international exchange for data as a utility with a global universal currency

The market opportunity is also clear: annual spending on tools for monetizing knowledge, expert search, and the creator economy is estimated to be in the hundreds of billions of dollars annually. The real disruption, however, lies in digital advertisement revenue and business models, which exceed $1 trillion annually.

On VideoMart, creators can sell videos directly to their audience, set their own prices, and keep up to 80% of their earnings with weekly payouts. Whether you are a filmmaker, educator, coach, trainer, artist, or independent creator, VideoMart gives you the tools to turn video content into a sustainable business.

Unlike traditional video platforms that depend on ad revenue, VideoMart follows a transactional video-on-demand (TVOD) model. Users pay only for the videos they want to watch, and creators earn directly from every purchase. No algorithm games. No subscription pressure. No gatekeepers.

VideoMart also focuses heavily on copyright protection and content ownership. Every upload is monitored to ensure creators’ work is protected, disputes are handled fairly, and original content retains its long-term earning potential.

This page shares insights on creator monetization, selling videos online, the creator economy, pricing digital content, pay-per-view strategies, and building sustainable income as a creator. We also share updates from the VideoMart ecosystem, product features, and practical knowledge for creators who want to move from free content to paid value.

If you believe your content is worth money, you’re in the right place.

myBRANDbldr is an AI-powered personal branding platform built for creators and early-career professionals who want to show up consistently, communicate their value clearly, and build an online presence that opens real doors.

We started in the creator economy — helping Gen Z content creators develop their voice, plan their content, and post with confidence across platforms. But a personal brand isn't just for influencers. It belongs to anyone building a career, exploring opportunities, or trying to make a meaningful first impression in a crowded market. That's why we're expanding myBRANDbldr into a tool for students, career switchers, and emerging professionals who are ready to take their story seriously.

At the core of our platform is iBld — an AI brand navigator that learns your voice, helps you define your positioning, and guides you through a simple, repeatable content rhythm. We call it your personal brand operating system: a framework that grows with you from your first internship application to your first leadership role and beyond.

What myBRANDbldr helps you do:
- Clarify your personal brand identity and positioning
- Build a consistent content rhythm without burning out
- Craft career-ready storytelling for LinkedIn and beyond
- Move from scattered posts to a purposeful, strategic presence
- Develop a long-term brand asset — not just a social media following

We're building in public, learning from our early community, and designing every feature around one question: does this help someone tell their story better?

If you're ready to build something that lasts, we're glad you're here.

Name: SMMI Social Media Marketing Influence
Description:
SMMI is a unique influencer marketing platform which allows influencers to promote brands on social media. Our application's main idea is to allow influencers to automatically post content via our application (we already have integrations with Facebook, Instagram, and TikTok). How it works - an influencer logs in to the mobile application, and among the brands' campaigns he sees in the app, he can choose the one he wants to participate in.
Then he creates a post that matches the campaign description and submits it for publishing.
Once a brand approves this post, an influencer gets the notification and can publish it via our application directly to his social media feed.We use social media API to get the influencer's profile details, post content directly from our application, and gather the analytics on the published content (which is one of our crucial functionality indeed).

The central collecting and listening module, the BrandFractalTM CommandCenter enables our clients to:  set up profiles to get relevant data into 1 dashboard; perform mood analysis on the received data; identify top posters and champions/snipers; work on a live Twitter wall to identify top hashtags, languages and users; identify key words; compare different search profiles; assign and follow up tasks to the team and advanced reporting and much more.
The BrandFractal Reporter Module enables you to prepare reports based on performance, trends and further analytics.
The BrandFractal Ticket Services Modules enables both alerting, webcare and task management.

Name: Noiz Analytics
Description:
Noiz Analytics aims to cover all the bases for any brand manager when it’s time to talk about Brand Monitoring. The goal of the tool is to see what consumers will find (online buzz) in a typical search process for a product or service, starting at the core: search engine monitoring.

The tool lets a client quickly summarize what websites are on a customer's search domain by entering up to eight search terms. This first step is an important tool for any media buying firm or social network manager as it provides a clear map of where you need to focus your efforts: not only what websites but which landing pages to target.

The second report focuses on the “headline” by channel and time. It lets you track the top 25 Twitter, News, Blog, Video or Web pages on a specific topic for the previous 24 hours, week or month. Each result is then crawled to find relevant keywords based on your tracking objective. (e.g., Someone talked about your beta in their blog, or your president's name was mentioned in the news, etc.)

Finally, the last report summarizes the intelligence discovered in the first two reports and suggests similar sites based on a statistical model. This gives you a “footprint” of the top websites for your vertical market, product or brand.

Noiz Analytics can be summarized as a “low hanging fruit detector” for brand managers who need to get out an attack plan in less than 10 minutes.

Name: Soffun.live
Description:
Soffun is a premium livestreaming platform designed to help creators, entrepreneurs, and community leaders monetize every live moment. Whether you're launching exclusive content, hosting Q&As, performing, teaching, or building community, Soffun turns your livestream into a paid, pay-per-view experience.

Our vision is to make livestreaming the driving force behind the creator economy, where content is not just shared, but transformed into a sustainable business.
